title: Summary Totals from one board to be used in formulas on a new board
excerpt: I am fairly new to Monday.com and am migrating data from another system to Monday.com. I am needing to do some totals in a dashboard that require formulas to be used. I would like to pull Summary totals from one board in…

posts.author: TinaR (Tina)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am fairly new to Monday.com and am migrating data from another system to Monday.com. I am needing to do some totals in a dashboard that require formulas to be used. I would like to pull Summary totals from one board into another board to run formulas against. I have been looking for a way to do this and have not been able to find a viable solution. Can this be done? I have attached an example of the finished product I would like to have. I can pull the first 3 totals out of the original board but the final total will require a formula to be done. Also is there a widget/app that can be used in dashboards to produce a summary view such as the example I have attached, currently I can only pull one total at a time using the Numbers widget in the Dashboard.? Thank you in advance for any advice on this.

Example Table441×181 15.5 KB

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t think this can be done natively on monday yet. More Charts, easy BI reports and charts, and Analytics & Reports are 3 apps to trial.

If you need help with set up you can book in for a free initial consultation here → https://calendar.app.google/VhBQmGX2k3sL1uZ36

posts.author: TinaR (Tina)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you, I will look these over.
